name: /doctor exits zero when only first-class languages are present in the repo
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{}\n' > repo/package.json && printf 'const x=1\n' > repo/x.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check coverage --root repo 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" = "0" ] && grep -q 'all_first_class=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
